evidence: Got this one for the kids, as it is a kids show after all.
The kids love this cartoon and it makes great Halloween viewing.
We're not talking Gone with the Wind or Citizen Kane here, we're talking a live action version of a Nick cartoon.
The story itself is quite good.
Sit back and prepare for an adventure full of laughs and action.
The humor is adult as there is some language, but nothing more than you'll find on half the TV shows out there.
Don't expect much, but the kiddies seem to enjoy it.
The over use on focusing on the 'bits' detracts from the overall quality.
If you're an Evel fan yourself or want to introduce someone else to the world of Evel then this is a great video to have.
I got the kiddo's watching this on Disney a few years ago.
They are very educational and very tricky in how they add the education in there.
Some have a point, some are just for fun, and that makes them perfect.
They are there to help children understand morals although they are not preachy.

summary: The user has a strong preference for children's animation and comedy, particularly those that engage kids with fun and educational content. They appreciate fast-paced narratives that are simple and entertaining, while showing a low sensitivity to production quality.
